source: Movebank (movebank.org) — public data API + Movebank Data Repository
dataKind: real recorded historical GPS / Argos tracking data — NOT live / real-time
note: Coordinates rounded to 4 decimals and tracks downsampled for rendering; reported distances computed on full-resolution fixes.

studies.name: Galapagos Albatrosses
studies.citation: Cruz S, Proaño CB, Anderson D, Huyvaert K, Wikelski M (2013) Data from: The Environmental-Data Automated Track Annotation (Env-DATA) System. Movebank Data Repository.
studies.blurb: Critically endangered seabirds breeding on Española Island that forage along the Humboldt Current upwelling off South America.

studies.name: LifeTrack White Stork SW Germany
studies.citation: Fiedler W, Flack A, Schäfle W, Keeves B, Quetting M, Eid B, Schmid H, Wikelski M (2019) Data from: Study "LifeTrack White Stork SW Germany" (2013-2019). Movebank Data Repository.
studies.region: Lake Constance, SW Germany ↔ Iberia & sub-Saharan Africa
studies.blurb: Storks following the western European flyway south through Iberia and across the Strait of Gibraltar into West Africa.

studies.name: Fall migration routes, timing, and wintering sites of North American ospreys as determined by satellite telemetry
studies.citation: Martell MS, Douglas D. 2019. Data from: Fall migration routes, timing, and wintering sites of North American ospreys as determined by satellite telemetry. Movebank Data Repository. https://doi.org/10.5441/001/1.sv6335t3
studies.blurb: A fish-eating raptor that migrates each autumn from North American breeding grounds to Central and South America, recorded fix by fix.

studies.name: True navigation in migrating gulls requires intact olfactory nerves
studies.citation: Wikelski M, Arriero E, Gagliardo A, Holland RA, Huttunen MJ, Juvaste R, Mueller I, Tertitski G, Thorup K, Wild M, Alanko M, Bairlein F, Cherenkov A, Cameron A, Flatz R, Hannila J, Hüppop O, Kangasniemi M, Kranstauber B, Penttinen M, Safi K, Semashko V, Schmid H, Wistbacka R. 2015. Data from: True navigation in migrating gulls requires intact olfactory nerves. Movebank Data Repository. https://doi.org/10.5441/001/1.q986rc29
studies.blurb: A versatile seabird increasingly tracked to understand its shifting migrations between northern Europe and African and Iberian coasts.

studies.name: When Siberia came to The Netherlands: the response of continental black-tailed godwits to a rare spring weather event
studies.citation: Senner N, Verhoeven M, Abad-Gómez JM, Gutiérrez J, Hooijmeijer J, Kentie R, Masero J, Tibbitts T, Piersma T. 2015. Data from: When Siberia came to The Netherlands: the response of continental black-tailed godwits to a rare spring weather event. Movebank Data Repository. https://doi.org/10.5441/001/1.m3b75054
studies.blurb: A long-billed shorebird whose populations undertake demanding flyway migrations between European wetlands and African wintering sites.

studies.name: Intra-African movements of the African Cuckoo Cuculus gularis as revealed by satellite telemetry
studies.citation: Iwajomo SB, Willemoes M, Ottosson U, Strandberg R, Thorup K. 2017. Data from: Intra-African movements of the African Cuckoo Cuculus gularis as revealed by satellite telemetry. Movebank Data Repository. https://doi.org/10.5441/001/1.b800b7c3
studies.blurb: Famous brood parasite and long-haul migrant; satellite tags revealed its previously mysterious intra-African and Afro-Palaearctic routes.

studies.name: A periodic Markov model to formalise animal migration on a network [white-fronted goose data]
studies.citation: Kruckenberg H, Müskens GJDM, Ebbinge BS. 2018. Data from: A periodic Markov model to formalise animal migration on a network [white-fronted goose data]. Movebank Data Repository. https://doi.org/10.5441/001/1.kk38017f
studies.blurb: A high-latitude waterfowl that migrates in flocks between Arctic breeding tundra and temperate wintering grounds along major flyways.

studies.name: Study "Bald Eagle - Haliaeetus leucocephalus - Biodiversity Research Institute" [part]
studies.citation: DeSorbo CR. 2026. Data from: Study "Bald Eagle - Haliaeetus leucocephalus - Biodiversity Research Institute" [part]. Movebank Data Repository. https://doi.org/10.5441/001/1.704
studies.blurb: A large raptor whose seasonal movements between breeding and wintering ranges are revealed in detail by GPS telemetry.

studies.name: Science update for the South Peace Northern Caribou (Rangifer tarandus caribou pop. 15) in British Columbia
studies.citation: Seip DR, Price E. 2019. Data from: Science update for the South Peace Northern Caribou (Rangifer tarandus caribou pop. 15) in British Columbia. Movebank Data Repository. https://doi.org/10.5441/001/1.p5bn656k
studies.blurb: Caribou undertake some of the longest land migrations on Earth, moving between calving grounds and wintering ranges across the north.

studies.name: Study "Green turtles (Chelonia Mydas); Hays; Chagos Archipelago, Western Indian Ocean"
studies.citation: Hays GC, Esteban N, Rattray A. 2024. Data from: Study "Green turtles (Chelonia Mydas); Hays; Chagos Archipelago, Western Indian Ocean". Movebank Data Repository. https://doi.org/10.5441/001/1.313
studies.blurb: Green turtles tagged at remote Indian Ocean nesting beaches, tracked by satellite as they swim hundreds of kilometres to distant foraging grounds.

studies.name: Behavioural estimation of blue whale movements in the Northeast Pacific from state-space model analysis of satellite tracks
studies.citation: Mate BR, Palacios DM, Irvine LM, Follett TM. 2019. Data from: Behavioural estimation of blue whale movements in the Northeast Pacific from state-space model analysis of satellite tracks. Movebank Data Repository. https://doi.org/10.5441/001/1.5ph88fk2
studies.blurb: The largest animal that has ever lived, satellite-tagged off California as it ranges the eastern Pacific between feeding and breeding areas.

studies.name: Suite of simple metrics reveals common movement syndromes across vertebrate taxa
studies.citation: Abrahms B. 2017. Data from: Suite of simple metrics reveals common movement syndromes across vertebrate taxa. Movebank Data Repository. https://doi.org/10.5441/001/1.hm5nk220
studies.blurb: A deep-diving marine mammal that ranges thousands of kilometres across the open ocean between haul-out beaches and rich foraging grounds.

studies.name: Commuting fruit bats beneficially modulate their flight in relation to wind
studies.citation: Dechmann DKN, Fahr J, Wikelski M. 2014. Data from: Commuting fruit bats beneficially modulate their flight in relation to wind. Movebank Data Repository. https://doi.org/10.5441/001/1.62s17b4v
studies.blurb: Africa's great mammal migration by air — fruit bats travel in vast numbers between roosts, dispersing seeds across the continent.
